landing.headline: See how air quality impacts
landing.subtext: Track outdoor pollution, monitor your indoor air, and connect your sleep data from Garmin. AirIQ analyzes everything together to give you personalized recommendations for better sleep and smarter training.
landing.loginCta: Log in to access all features
login.title: Sign in to AirIQ
login.subtitle: Track air quality at your locations
login.errorRequired: Please enter your email and password.
register.title: Create your account
register.subtitle: Start tracking air quality at your locations
register.errorEmailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
register.errorPasswordLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
forgot.title: Reset your password
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a reset link.
forgot.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
forgot.sentMessage: If an account exists for {{email}}, we've sent a password reset link. Check your inbox and spam folder.
emailBanner.verified: Verification email sent — check your inbox.
settings.title: Settings
settings.profileDesc: Update how your name appears in the app.
settings.geminiHealthInsightsHelp: When enabled, optional AI text for sleep and training insights may send summarized health-related data to Google. You can turn this off anytime.
settings.passwordDesc: Use a strong password you don't use elsewhere.
settings.errorPasswordLength: New password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.deleteDesc: Deactivates your account and signs you out of all devices. Your data will be permanently removed after 30 days.
settings.deletePasswordError: Please enter your password to confirm.
settings.deleteConfirm: Are you sure? Your account will be deactivated and your data will be permanently removed after 30 days. You can reactivate by registering with the same email within that period.
dashboard.connectIndoorPrompt: Connect your indoor device to start seeing room data.
dashboard.connectDeviceHint: Use your current setup flow for Qingping/AirIQ Home pairing.
dashboard.refreshCooldown: You can refresh every 5 minutes only.
dashboard.checkForNewerReading: AirIQ will check for a newer sensor reading.
dashboard.newerUpdateAvailable: A newer sensor update may be available now.
dashboard.connectSensorPrompt: Connect a sensor to start seeing room data.
dashboard.aiHint: Generate personalised outdoor and indoor recommendations powered by Gemini based on your current air quality readings.
dashboard.adminOverrideDesc: Override only the values you want to test. Any field left blank will keep the current live dashboard value.
dashboard.adminPreviewActive: Preview mode is active. Live dashboard data is unchanged underneath.
dashboard.adminAtLeastOneValue: Enter at least one test value to preview the dashboard.
source.label: Source: {{provider}} ({{method}})
source.liveOutdoor: Live outdoor air quality based on selected location.
location.locationNote: AirIQ asks your browser or Windows for an estimated location. On desktop or Ethernet it can be a little off.
location.manualNote: For the most precise data, enter your address manually.
location.geolocationUnsupported: Geolocation is not supported in this browser.
location.failedToLoadAirData: Failed to load air data for this location.
location.failedToLoadLiveData: Failed to load live air data.
location.failedToLookUp: Failed to look up that address.
location.geoNote1: AirIQ asks your browser or Windows for an estimated location. On desktop or Ethernet it can be a little off.
location.geoNote2: For the most precise data, enter your address manually.
indoor.noHistoryDesc: Connect and sync a Qingping sensor first, then AirIQ will start building your indoor timeline here automatically.
indoor.failedToLoadSensor: Failed to load indoor sensor data.
suggestions.loadingDesc: Checking your latest indoor and outdoor conditions.
suggestions.emptyDesc: Current indoor and outdoor conditions look stable.
plan.title: Choose your plan
deviceSetup.checkingSubtitle: AirIQ is checking whether this account already has a Qingping integration and a selected indoor sensor.
deviceSetup.introSubtitle: Start with Qingping as the first supported AirIQ Home device. We'll guide the user through connection here instead of jumping straight into pairing from the dashboard.
deviceSetup.qingpingDesc: Indoor air data for temperature, humidity, PM, and CO2.
deviceSetup.credentialsSubtitle: Paste the Qingping app_key and app_secret for your developer app. AirIQ will validate them with Qingping before saving the connection.
deviceSetup.bothRequired: Enter both your Qingping app key and app secret.
deviceSetup.selectSubtitle: AirIQ found your Qingping devices. Choose the indoor sensor you want to sync into your dashboard.
deviceSetup.connectedSubtitle: AirIQ can now use your Qingping integration and sync the selected indoor sensor into your dashboard.
footer.tagline: Know what you're breathing - and what to do about it.
common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
settings.changePasswordDesc: Use a strong password you don't use elsewhere.
settings.passwordMinLength: New password must be at least 8 characters.
settings.deleteAccountDesc: Deactivates your account and signs you out of all devices. Your data will be permanently removed after 30 days.
settings.pleaseEnterPassword: Please enter your password to confirm.
settings.deleteConfirmation: Are you sure? Your account will be deactivated and your data will be permanently removed after 30 days. You can reactivate by registering with the same email within that period.
resetPassword.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
resetPassword.doneSubtitle: Your password has been changed. You can now log in.
resetPassword.title: Choose a new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
feedback.writeMessage: Please write a message before submitting.
feedback.genericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
feedback.receivedMessage: We've received your message and will look into it. Your input helps us improve AirIQ for everyone.
feedback.title: Send feedback
feedback.subtitle: Let us know what's on your mind{{name}}. We read every submission.
farewell.title: Thank you for using AirIQ
farewell.body: Your account has been deactivated. Your data will be kept for 30 days in case you change your mind — simply create a new account with the same email to pick up where you left off.
farewell.body2: We hope to see you again!
welcomeBack.title: Welcome back{{name}}!
welcomeBack.body: Your account has been reactivated. Everything is just as you left it.
